comments.author: @WhereonEarth4K
comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Myanmar episode. Tours, books, cookbooks, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE MYANMAR COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, cookbook, and cultural item we'd recommend for this episode → https://amzn.to/4ah9C3h

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN MYANMAR*
  ◦ Bagan temples, Inle Lake, Yangon and beyond → https://shorturl.at/aevmX
  ◦ Browse all Myanmar experiences → https://shorturl.at/gVtzW

*📖 PLAN YOUR MYANMAR TRIP*
  ◦ Lonely Planet Burmese Phrasebook & Dictionary, the pocket guide for the language of temples and tea shops → https://amzn.to/3PI0NIY

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO MYANMAR*
  ◦ The Hidden History of Burma by Thant Myint-U, the Foreign Affairs Best Book of 2020 on the country's tragic turn after democracy → https://amzn.to/4tZCVyk
  ◦ The River of Lost Footsteps by Thant Myint-U, the definitive narrative history of Burma told by the grandson of UN Secretary-General U Thant → https://amzn.to/43Ava7g
  ◦ Twilight Over Burma by Inge Sargent, the Austrian princess of Hsipaw's memoir of the 1962 coup that took her husband → https://amzn.to/4wVrydC

*🍲 BRING MYANMAR HOME*
  ◦ Burma: Rivers of Flavor by Naomi Duguid, the IACP Award winning cookbook of Burmese cuisine → https://amzn.to/4vkxE5P
  ◦ Burmese Light: Impressions of the Golden Land by Hans Kemp, the coffee-table photography volume that captures the country before the silence returned → https://amzn.to/4dQfLok
